## Summary

This PR improves documentation clarity for `EvaluationResult.feedback_config` by documenting behavior for unknown keys and partial dictionaries.

## Related Issue

- Closes or addresses: https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain/issues/31802

## What Changed

1. Added explicit notes on how unknown fields are handled.
2. Added explicit notes on partial dict behavior.
3. Added one valid and one invalid example configuration.
4. Added short warning guidance to reduce silent misconfiguration risk.

## Why

Current behavior can be misread as permissive in some cases. Clear examples and explicit wording help users avoid hidden configuration errors.

## Validation

1. Verified examples are consistent with current implementation behavior.
2. Verified docs links and formatting render correctly.
